sub_modules.fir_coeff_rom_101: Combinational ROM for the exact 101 signed Q15 band-pass FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.fir_tap_mult: Combinational signed sample-by-coefficient multiplier for one FIR tap.
sub_modules.fir_sum_tree_101: Combinational 101-product signed accumulator widened to 64 bits.
sub_modules.fir_q15_normalize: Combinational arithmetic right shift by 15 to convert the Q15 accumulator to output scale.
sub_modules.fir_mac_101: Combinational 101-tap FIR MAC that wires coefficient ROMs, tap multipliers, and the sum tree.
